meta_desc_index: Secure your Web3 journey. Zero-trust approval auditing and real-time permission defense. Permanent clarity, professional security.
hero_desc:
Proactive protection against risky approvals and dangerous permissions. Detect hidden drains and malicious hooks before they compromise your assets.

No private key storage. Wallet-signed transactions only. Non-custodial.
hero_disclaimer: No private key storage. Wallet-signed transactions only. Non-custodial.
stage2_desc: Stale or unlimited approvals are the primary attack paths for modern exploits. Our risk engine identifies high-risk protocols and identifies silent connections that could lead to asset drains.
stage3_desc: Decode complex smart contract logic into clear security signals. Analyze spender reputation, contract trust signals, and perform one-tap revocations for any unsafe allowance.
pro_desc: Automate your security workflow with 24/7 monitoring and batch remediation tools built for intensive wallet management.
stage5_desc: Instant asset isolation through fast revocation. In the event of a breach, trigger emergency response directly through your connected wallet. Transparent, trustless, and wallet-signed.
footer_labs: A PRODUCT OF IBITI SECURITY LABS.
footer_slogan: Proactive defense for the decentralized era.
footer_copy: © 2026 IBITI LABS. SECURING YOUR ON-CHAIN JOURNEY.
terms_1_text: By accessing or using DrainShield, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the app, website, or related services.
terms_2_text: DrainShield is a non-custodial wallet security application developed by IBITI Labs. Depending on supported platform features, app version, and service tier, DrainShield may provide:
terms_2_item_1: Wallet connection and wallet-based security workflows
terms_2_item_2: Scanning of token approvals and wallet exposure
terms_2_item_3: Risk analysis based on public blockchain data and external intelligence sources
terms_2_item_4: Flagging of suspicious, risky, or known malicious spender addresses and contracts
terms_2_item_5: Approval review and revoke assistance through the user’s connected wallet
terms_2_item_6: Alerts, monitoring tools, or premium features where offered
terms_2_footer: DrainShield is non-custodial. It does not hold your assets, store your private keys, or sign transactions on your behalf outside your wallet’s own approval flow.
terms_3_title: 3. No Financial, Investment, or Legal Advice
terms_3_text: DrainShield provides security information, warnings, technical analysis, and workflow tools only. Nothing in the app or website constitutes financial advice, investment advice, legal advice, tax advice, or a guarantee that a transaction, token, contract, protocol, or wallet is safe.
terms_4_item_1: You are solely responsible for your wallet, private keys, recovery phrases, devices, and transaction decisions.
terms_4_item_2: You must review all wallet prompts and transaction details before signing.
terms_4_item_3: You are responsible for network fees, gas costs, and failed transaction costs.
terms_4_item_4: You understand that security signals, scores, alerts, and labels are informational and may be incomplete, delayed, or incorrect.
terms_5_text: Blockchain security analysis has limits. DrainShield may rely on public chain data, third-party APIs, remote threat feeds, on-device logic, wallet providers, RPC endpoints, and mobile platform services.
terms_5_text_2: As a result, DrainShield may fail to identify some threats, may classify a safe contract as risky, may classify a risky contract as lower risk than expected, or may miss changes that happen after a scan.
terms_5_text_3: No security tool can guarantee complete protection from exploits, phishing, malicious permissions, contract upgrades, wallet compromise, social engineering, or asset loss.
terms_6_text: DrainShield may use or depend on third-party services, including but not limited to wallet connection infrastructure, blockchain data providers, RPC providers, notification services, payment or subscription platforms, and external threat intelligence feeds.
terms_6_text_2: We are not responsible for outages, inaccuracies, delays, security incidents, policy changes, or billing issues caused by third-party services.
terms_7_text: Some features may be offered only through a paid or premium plan. Availability, pricing, billing periods, renewal behavior, free trials, and cancellation options may depend on the platform through which you obtained the subscription.
terms_7_text_2: Unless required by applicable law, purchases, subscription charges, and platform billing disputes are governed by the relevant app store or payment provider rules.
terms_8_text: You agree not to misuse DrainShield, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access to related systems, abuse third-party infrastructure used by the service, or use the service in connection with unlawful activity.
terms_8_text_2: We may limit or suspend access to the service where reasonably necessary to protect the product, users, infrastructure, or legal compliance.
terms_9_text: DrainShield is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, IBITI Labs disclaims warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including warranties of availability, accuracy, reliability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, and uninterrupted operation.
terms_10_text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, IBITI Labs, DrainShield, and their developers, contributors, partners, and service providers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or punitive damages, or for any loss of digital assets, profits, revenue, data, goodwill, or opportunities arising out of or related to your use of the service.
terms_10_text_2: This limitation applies even if a risk alert was missed, delayed, incomplete, or inaccurate.
terms_11_title: 11. Changes to the Service or Terms
terms_11_text: We may update, modify, suspend, or discontinue parts of DrainShield or these Terms of Use at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.
terms_12_text: For questions regarding these Terms of Use, contact: info@ibiticoin.com
privacy_1_text: DrainShield is a non-custodial wallet security application developed by IBITI Labs. This Privacy Policy explains what data DrainShield does and does not collect when you use the app, website, and related services.
privacy_1_text_2: Our core principle is simple: security analysis should not require surrendering control of your wallet or personal identity.
privacy_2_text: DrainShield is designed to minimize data collection. We do not intentionally collect or store the following:
privacy_2_item_4: Direct personal identity data such as your name or home address
privacy_3_text: To analyze token approvals, contract risk signals, and related wallet security information, DrainShield may process public blockchain data associated with wallet addresses that you choose to scan or connect.
privacy_3_text_2: Wallet addresses and approval data are public by nature on blockchain networks. DrainShield uses external infrastructure and indexing providers to retrieve this information in real time.
privacy_3_text_3: IBITI Labs does not claim ownership of public blockchain data and does not treat public wallet activity as private user content.
privacy_4_text: DrainShield may rely on third-party services such as blockchain APIs, wallet connection providers, subscription services, push notification infrastructure, RPC endpoints, and external threat intelligence feeds.
privacy_4_text_2: When you use DrainShield, some technical data necessary to deliver app functionality may be processed by those providers under their own terms and privacy practices.
privacy_5_text: Certain settings and app preferences may be stored locally on your device for functionality and convenience. This may include language preferences, app state, linked wallet labels, cached scan results, or similar configuration data.
privacy_5_text_2: Local device storage is not the same as centralized storage on our servers.
privacy_6_text: If you enable security alerts, monitoring, or similar features, DrainShield may need to process limited technical data related to watched wallets, alert preferences, device notification tokens, or monitoring state in order to deliver those features.
privacy_6_text_2: These features are functional security tools, not advertising systems.
privacy_7_text: DrainShield is built as a non-custodial product. We do not store private keys or initiate wallet transactions without user approval in the connected wallet.
privacy_7_text_2: However, no app, website, API provider, or mobile device environment can guarantee absolute security.
privacy_8_text: DrainShield is not directed to children under the age required by applicable law to use digital financial or blockchain-related services independently.
privacy_9_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect product changes, infrastructure changes, legal requirements, or security improvements. The updated version will be posted on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.
privacy_10_text: For privacy-related questions, contact: info@ibiticoin.com
